reviews.comment:
Le doy una estrella por ser buena, mal organizado todo ,desde el comienzo! Una fila de más de media hora para poder cargar! Lástima que es YPF, en temporada alta se deben poner más empleados!!!

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it one star because it's good, but everything is badly organized from the start! There was a line of over half an hour just to fill up! It's a shame it's YPF; they should hire more staff during peak season!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNHF1LXZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se negaron a darnos ticket de compra y sumar puntos con la app. Según los empleados  reciben la orden de no facturar.

(Translated by Google)
They refused to give us a receipt and credit us with points through the app. According to the employees, they receive orders not to issue invoices.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención,  habiendo tres empleados atiende uno solo en la playa. Mucho tiempo de espera.

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible; with three employees, only one was serving customers on the beach. The wait was very long.
